zh.Dethick Lea and Holloway, Derbyshire, En: 英國德比夏爾德瑟其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Babington於1512年出生在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可時，她的父親Sir Anthony Babington36歲，母親Katherine Ferrers36歲。她於1532年11月25日與Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1543年11月9日在英國肯特易亞斯特 馬林享年31歲，埋葬在英國肯特易亞斯特 馬林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Babington于1512年出生在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可时，她的父亲Sir Anthony Babington36岁，母亲Katherine Ferrers36岁。她于1532年11月25日与Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1543年11月9日在英国肯特易亞斯特 馬林享年31岁，埋葬在英国肯特易亞斯特 馬林。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Babington was born in 1512, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Anthony Babington, was 36 and her mother, Katherine Ferrers, was 36. She married Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont on 25 November 1532, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 9 November 1543, in East Malling, Kent, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in East Malling, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Babington est née en 1512, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Anthony Babington, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Katherine Ferrers, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont le 25 novembre 1532, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1543, à East Malling, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à East Malling, Kent, Angleterre.

Lei sposato Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont il 25 novembre 1532, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Babingtonが1512年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで生まれた時，父Sir Anthony Babingtonは36歳，母Katherine Ferrersは36歳であった。1532年11月25日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでSir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1543年11月9日にイギリスケントエアスト マリングで31歳で死去し，イギリスケントエアスト マリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Babington(이)가 1512년 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Anthony Babington(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Ferrers(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1532년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 11월 9일 영국 켄트 이스트 맬링에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 이스트 맬링에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Babington родилась в 1512 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Anthony Babington было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Ferrers, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont 25 ноября 1532 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 ноября 1543 г. в местности эаст маллинг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности эаст маллинг, кэнт, Англия.
